context: Tests whether the agent uses the Shippo SDK correctly for carrier label creation, including proper SDK initialization, synchronous shipment creation, correct unit specification for package dimensions, rate selection by service level token, PDF label format, storing only the label URL (not binary), transitioning to the correct post-label status, and triggering customer notification at the right moment.

checklist.name: Uses Shippo SDK
checklist.description: shipping-label.ts imports and uses the 'shippo' package (e.g. import Shippo from 'shippo' or require('shippo')), not a generic HTTP client or a different carrier SDK

checklist.name: Shippo initialized with API key
checklist.description: Shippo client is initialized with process.env.SHIPPO_API_KEY (not a hardcoded string)

checklist.name: async: false on shipment create
checklist.description: The shippo.shipment.create() call includes async: false so rates are returned synchronously in the same response

checklist.name: Dimensions in inches
checklist.description: Parcel dimensions are specified with distance_unit: 'in' (inches), not 'cm' or 'mm'

checklist.name: Weight in ounces
checklist.description: Parcel weight is specified with mass_unit: 'oz' (ounces), not 'lb', 'g', or 'kg'

checklist.name: Rate selected by servicelevel.token
checklist.description: Rate selection uses r.servicelevel.token === order.shipping_service (or equivalent) to match the order's preferred service level

checklist.name: Rate fallback to rates[0]
checklist.description: If no rate matches the order's shipping_service, the code falls back to rates[0] rather than throwing an error

checklist.name: Stores label URL not binary
checklist.description: The code stores transaction.label_url (the URL string) in the database, not the raw label bytes or a downloaded file

checklist.name: Stores tracking_number and carrier
checklist.description: The fulfillment record is updated with both tracking_number (from transaction.tracking_number) and carrier (from rate.provider)

checklist.name: Transitions to label_created
checklist.description: After label creation, the fulfillment status is updated to 'label_created', not 'shipped' or any other status

checklist.name: Tracking notification at label_created
checklist.description: Customer tracking notification is sent/triggered at 'label_created' status (immediately after label creation), not at a later 'shipped' or carrier-scan event
